Title: <Concise, single-scope change>

Linked Issue: Closes #<issue-number>

Summary
- What: <1–2 lines>
- Why: <1–2 lines>

Implementation
- Key changes (files/modules):
- Flags/feature toggles (if any):

Model
- Model used: <e.g., openai/o3, openai/gpt-4.1, openai/gpt-5>

Test Plan
- Unit: <commands/areas>
- Integration/manual: <steps>
- Edge cases: <list at least 1–2>

Acceptance Criteria Mapping
- [ ] Criterion 1 → Evidence
- [ ] Criterion 2 → Evidence

Checklist
- [ ] Read and followed `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (Tauri-first, TS no `any`, no `sleep`)
- [ ] Small PR (single scope), tests green, docs updated
